evidence_scope: Optimization-regression A/B only. These RUN-first argmax outputs are controls for prechunk semantic identity, not a claim of acceptable absolute model quality.
anomaly_accounting: greeting begins in Chinese (你好), then collapses into punctuation, digits, whitespace, and a replacement glyph
explain_diffusion starts with a correct answer, then mixes punctuation, English repetition, the Chinese token 生成, and sentence/model loops
moon_phases starts correctly, then repeats the sentence, emits replacement glyphs and numeric garbage, and truncates mid-sentence
the stored decoded outputs do not contain the literal word 'user'; 'user' appears only in rendered chat-template prompts

verdict: PASS for optimization regression: all three prompt-correct committed blocks and decoded texts are byte-identical to the monolithic previous-default control. Existing #48291 degeneration is neither improved nor worsened.
